user_intent: Runner from behind running away from camera down a long urban street. Long dramatic shadow stretching toward camera. This is the 'streak' image — showing up week after week. Solitary determination. Hard backlight. Oakley ad campaign energy.

subject.description: Black man seen from behind, mid 30s, strong athletic build visible through his fitted shirt, dark brown skin on his calves and arms glistening with sweat, powerful stride with one foot pushing off the ground, running directly away from camera into the distance, his shadow stretching long and dramatic toward the camera
clothing: black fitted running shirt with a neon lime green stripe across the shoulders
neon lime green shoes with reflective accents catching the backlight
accessories: reflective elements on shoes and shirt glowing from the hard backlight

scene.location: Long straight urban street in downtown Dallas Texas at night, the street lined with tall buildings on both sides creating a canyon effect, neon signs and lit windows creating points of lime green and orange light along the corridor, the street wet from a recent rain creating mirror-like reflections of all the lights, vanishing point visible far in the distance
scene.weather: just after rain, wet streets, slight mist in the air catching the backlighting, humidity visible

lighting.direction: powerful hard backlight from a streetlight directly behind the runner in the distance creating a full body rim light silhouette effect, neon lime green accent light from signs on the left, orange accent from a sign on the right, all lights reflecting off the wet street surface

materials.primary: wet asphalt reflecting neon lights like a mirror
materials.texture: wet reflective surfaces everywhere, the entire street is a light show

composition.framing: reflection shot — camera positioned at ground level on the wet street surface, capturing both the runner above AND his full reflection in the wet asphalt below, the image almost perfectly mirrored vertically
composition.angle: ultra low angle, camera literally on the wet pavement surface, half the frame is the real runner and half is his neon-lit reflection in the puddle
composition.focus_subject: the runner's reflection in the wet street is the primary subject, razor sharp, with the real runner slightly softer above creating a dreamlike double

quality.sharpness: razor-sharp rim light edges on subject, crisp reflections on wet street
quality.post_processing: cinematic color grading with crushed blacks and lifted neon highlights, heavy contrast, film grain, the wet street reflections should feel almost surreal with color, Blade Runner meets Nike campaign

negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text overlay, distorted hands, extra fingers, cartoon, illustration, flat lighting, dry street, daytime, stock photo, multiple people, group shot, looking at camera, gym
